title: alchemilla flabellata var. pusilla
intro: Alchemilla flabellata var. pusilla, also known as dwarf lady's mantle, is a low-growing perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a useful treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla flabellata var. pusilla include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
